Grad Cafe Analytics
  • Grad Cafe Analytics

Grad Cafe Analytics

A test-driven, documented data and web analysis service for thegradcafe.com admissions data.

The service has two halves:

  • a Web layer (Flask) that serves an Analysis page with Pull Data and Update Analysis buttons, and

  • a Data layer (ETL + PostgreSQL) that scrapes, cleans, loads, and summarises applicant entries.

This documentation covers how to set the project up, how the pieces fit together, the API reference for every module, and how to run the test suite.
